reasoning.pe_analyst: The ARR, ACV, client growth, and retention metrics directly inform the potential for scalable revenue and market penetration, making Kelpglobal a more attractive investment candidate for deeper diligence.
reasoning.banker: Strong ARR growth and client traction data would signal a healthy, growing business, potentially making it a more appealing target for M&A advisory or capital raising services.
reasoning.credit_analyst: ARR and client retention rates are key indicators of revenue stability and predictability, which are crucial for assessing creditworthiness and mitigating default risk.
reasoning.consultant: Client engagement and retention data, alongside testimonials, would provide initial insights into the platform's stickiness and value proposition, guiding potential operational improvement strategies.

sections.heading: AI Platform Capabilities

fields.label: Key AI modules/features (e.g., Precision Target Sourcing, Disciplined Deal Execution, Optimised Value Creation)

value.name: Precision Target Sourcing
value.description: Unearths hidden opportunities from current data sources with AI-accelerated thematic deal origination.

value.name: Disciplined Deal Execution
value.description: Drives robust diligence and builds narratives with richer intelligence, including AI-enhanced exploration tools and data-driven, AI-drafted memos.

value.name: Optimised Value Creation
value.description: Gains greater visibility to keep investments on track with single-system collaboration and automated monitoring, and protects portfolio performance with AI-enhanced value creation software.

fields.label: Number of data sources integrated (e.g., public, proprietary, client-specific)
fields.value: 360° private company data (paid, public, proprietary); client's current data sources; 365 account; PitchBook data

Regulatory compliance certifications (e.g., ISO 27001, SOC 2 Type II, if applicable)
Data residency options offered (e.g., India, global)
Technology stack highlights (if disclosed)
fields.value: AI-enhanced software and services, proprietary software technology, advanced algorithms

value.description: Integration of PitchBook data (financial data on private and public companies, investors, funds, limited partners, and service providers) within Kelp's software suite.

sections.heading: Alternative Investment Tech Landscape

fields.label: Target client segments (e.g., by AUM range, firm type)
Key competitors (named list, India-specific and global)
Competitive advantages cited by company (e.g., AI efficacy, end-to-end solution)

value.description: AI-accelerated thematic deal origination: Unearths hidden opportunities and reveals hyper-relevant companies, moving from search to prioritized shortlists more quickly.
AI-enhanced diligence and deal execution: Drives robust diligence, unlocks extended company and market insight with AI, and eliminates bias with data-driven, AI-drafted memos.

Optimized value creation: Provides greater visibility for investments with single-system collaboration and automated monitoring, enabling faster reporting for portfolio companies and maximizing alignment.
End-to-end platform: Offers an all-in-one solution for private equity, covering precision target sourcing, disciplined deal execution, and optimized value creation.
Dedicated Experts (Managed Services): Connects clients with a team for expert advisory, on-demand research and analysis, and tech support throughout the investment lifecycle.

Integration-friendly and highly configurable: The platform integrates with secure data sources and 365 accounts, and its tools are built for private equity firms with built-in configurability for unique workflows.
Award-winning technology: The company states its technology is 'award-winning' and designed for the future of Private Equity.

fields.label: Market size estimate for Alt-InvTech in India (if available from reports)

value.note: Includes SEBI registered AIFs at $130 billion and other funds at $270 billion.
Represents a five-fold jump and a 22% compound annual growth rate (CAGR) from 2024.

fields.label: Number of similar platforms identified in India (Tracxn estimate)
Analyst/industry recognition or awards (if any)
